weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 17 total findings, with 14 unique CVEs tracked across various domains, including AI/ML threats, cloud/IAM, and containers/K8s. The most frequently seen CVEs, each observed once, include CVE-2026-9453, CVE-2026-7766, and several others, with older vulnerabilities such as CVE-2009-1537 and CVE-2010-0249 also detected. The majority of these findings were concentrated on May 25, 2026, highlighting a notable spike in security activity on this day, with multiple domains impacted, including crypto libraries, OS/kernel, and web/servers.
